pool.baseline: idk man. i was just looking at the stars and thinking about how huge everything is. everything we do, every single thing anyone has ever done... it's all just going to be swallowed by entropy anyway. in a few billion years there's not even gonna be light left. it feels like everything is just a massive, pointless joke. why even bother trying to fix anything or be anything if none of it actually matters in the end?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the spirit within my breast. He has gone, and with him, the very sun has departed from my world, leaving only this cold, suffocating shadow. I feel as though I am but a ghost already, drifting through these hollow halls. Is there not a certain grace in simply... letting the darkness take me? To cease this aching, to fade into the velvet night where no betrayal can reach?
